references.text:
[Ma35b] Mahler, Kurt, On the Lattice Points on Curves of Genus 1. Proc. London Math. Soc. (2) (1935), 431-466.
 
 [St08] Stewart, Cameron L., Cubic Thue equations with many solutions. Int. Math. Res. Not. IMRN (2008), Art. ID rnn040, 11.

remarks.text: Mordell proved that\[\limsup_{n\to \infty} 1_A\ast 1_A(n)=\infty\]and Mahler \cite{Ma35b} proved\[1_A\ast 1_A(n) \gg (\log n)^{1/4}\]for infinitely many $n$. Stewart \cite{St08} improved this to\[1_A\ast 1_A(n) \gg (\log n)^{11/13}.\]

statement.text: Let $A\subset\mathbb{N}$ be the set of cubes. Is it true that\[1_A\ast 1_A(n) \ll (\log n)^{O(1)}?\]
